de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExtractLocationParameter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExtractLocationParameter
  • Enclosing class:
    AbstractUpdateExtractor

    public class AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExtractLocationParameter
extends Object

    Instances of this class provides the Term which are required to compute a location (value or association of a given object/state).

    Instances of this class can be used to compute the values in each memory layout. So they are instantiated during the analyzation phase SymbolicLayoutExtractor.analyse() once for initial and current memory layout.

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Term arrayEndIndex
      The array end index or null if not used.

      The array index or null if not used.

      private Term arrayStartIndex
      The array start index or null if not used.
      private Term notAValue
      The constant representing the fact that no value is available.
      private Term parentTerm
      An optional parent object represented as Term.
      private int parentTermIndexInStatePredicate
      The index of the parent argument in the predicate used in side proof to compute the values.

      The LocationVariable which is used to make sure that the defined parent object of the initial state is used, because the expression (e.g.
      private ProgramVariable programVariable
      The ProgramVariable or null if an array index is used instead.
      private boolean stateMember
      Defines if this location should explicitly be shown on the state.
      private int valueTermIndexInStatePredicate
      The index of the value argument in the predicate used in side proof to compute the values.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected LocationVariable createLocationVariable(String name, Sort sort)
      Creates a new LocationVariable with the given name and Sort.
      Term createPreParentTerm()
      Creates the Term to compute the parent object with help of the pre update.
      Term createPreUpdate()
      Creates the pre update to make sure that the parent object defined by the expression is evaluated on the initial state because it might be changed in the current state due to updates.
      Term createPreValueTerm()
      Computes the Term to compute the value with help of the pre update.
      boolean equals(Object obj)
      Term getArrayEndIndex()
      Returns the array end index.

      Returns the array index.

      Returns the constant representing the fact that no value is available.

      Returns the optional parent object represented as Term.
      int getParentTermIndexInStatePredicate()
      Returns the index of the parent argument in the predicate used in side proof to compute the values.
      Term getPreUpdateTarget()
      Returns the right side of the update created by createPreUpdate().
      LocationVariable getPreVariable()
      Returns the pre variable.
      ProgramVariable getProgramVariable()
      Returns the ProgramVariable or null if an array index is used instead.
      int getValueTermIndexInStatePredicate()
      Returns the index of the value argument in the predicate used in side proof to compute the values.

      Checks if an array index is represented.

      Checks if an array range is represented.

      Checks if this location should explicitly be shown on the state.

      Sets the index of the parent argument in the predicate used in side proof to compute the values.

      Sets the index of the value argument in the predicate used in side proof to compute the values.

    • Field Detail

      • programVariable

        private final ProgramVariable programVariable
        The ProgramVariable or null if an array index is used instead.

      • arrayIndex

        private final Term arrayIndex
        The array index or null if not used.

      • arrayStartIndex

        private final Term arrayStartIndex
        The array start index or null if not used.

      • arrayEndIndex

        private final Term arrayEndIndex
        The array end index or null if not used.

      • parentTerm

        private final Term parentTerm
        An optional parent object represented as Term. If it is null an IProgramVariable of the state is represented.

      • parentTermIndexInStatePredicate

        private int parentTermIndexInStatePredicate
        The index of the parent argument in the predicate used in side proof to compute the values.

      • valueTermIndexInStatePredicate

        private int valueTermIndexInStatePredicate
        The index of the value argument in the predicate used in side proof to compute the values.

      • preVariable

        private final LocationVariable preVariable
        The LocationVariable which is used to make sure that the defined parent object of the initial state is used, because the expression (e.g. x.next) might refer to different objects in the current state.

      • stateMember

        private final boolean stateMember
        Defines if this location should explicitly be shown on the state.

      • arrayRangeConstant

        private final Term arrayRangeConstant
        The constant used to query an array range.

      • notAValue

        private final Term notAValue
        The constant representing the fact that no value is available.

        newParent - The new parent Term to be used instead of the original one.

                                      Sort sort)

        sort - The Sort of the new variable.

      • createPreUpdate

        public Term createPreUpdate()
        Creates the pre update to make sure that the parent object defined by the expression is evaluated on the initial state because it might be changed in the current state due to updates.
        Returns:
        The created Term with the pre update.
